content:
Perform the following tasks to complete your assignment:

Complete the reading assignment and the lecture before attempting this assignment. When completing the reading assignment, pay close attention to the brainstorming strategies discussed in your book:

Freewriting
Mapping/Clustering
Brainstorming/Listing
Questioning
Your prewriting must be substantive, meaning you have shown you have seriously considered all aspects of your topic and labeled the technique (freewriting, mapping/clustering, brainstorming/listing, or questioning) you used.

Use the ENG101 - Narrative Essay - Prewriting Worksheet ENG101 - Narrative Essay – Prewriting Worksheet Download ENG101 - Narrative Essay – Prewriting Worksheet to complete and submit this assignment.

Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 3 - 4 hours.

Completion
Use the proper naming convention when saving your assignment. The naming convention is ENG101_wk1_assn_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk1_assn_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
